commands.review_summary:
The branch adds a paged-result type/helper to `plugin-sdk/channel-actions`, uses it to normalize Discord `thread-list` results while preserving the raw `threads` payload, and updates tests, docs, and the SDK API baseline hash.

PR surface: Source +107, Tests +123, Docs 0, Generated 0. Total +230 across 6 files.

Reproducibility: yes. for source-level reproduction, not for a live current-main failure: current main returns only the raw `threads` object, while Discord archived-thread responses include `has_more`. A live Discord command in the PR body shows the after-fix normalized shape.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] The remaining blocker is maintainer API-contract judgment, not a narrow automated code repair.

target.title: Expose paged channel action results
target.body:
## Summary

- Add a generic SDK helper for paged channel action results so list/read-style plugin actions can expose `complete`, `hasMore`, `returnedCount`, `source`, `query`, and optional cursor metadata without losing channel-specific payloads.
- Wire Discord `thread-list` through the helper, preserving the previous raw `threads` result while adding normalized `items` and pagination fields.
- Cover both the SDK helper and the Discord archived-thread `has_more` regression, and document the updated `channel-actions` SDK surface.

## Verification

- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/plugin-sdk/channel-actions.test.ts extensions/discord/src/actions/runtime.test.ts`
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/plugins/contracts/plugin-sdk-subpaths.test.ts src/plugins/contracts/plugin-sdk-runtime-api-guardrails.test.ts`
- `node --max-old-space-size=8192 --import tsx scripts/generate-plugin-sdk-api-baseline.ts --check`
- `node scripts/run-tsgo.mjs -p tsconfig.core.json --incremental --tsBuildInfoFile .artifacts/tsgo-cache/core.tsbuildinfo`
- `node scripts/run-tsgo.mjs -p tsconfig.extensions.json --incremental --tsBuildInfoFile .artifacts/tsgo-cache/extensions.tsbuildinfo`
- `git diff --check`

## Real behavior proof

Behavior addressed: Discord thread-list actions no longer hide Discord pagination under the raw provider payload; agents now get explicit completion and cursor metadata while existing callers can still read the prior raw `threads` field.

Real environment tested: Wilfred's locally configured Discord bot in guild `1474893848617423062`, using read-only OpenClaw message actions with the local bundled Discord plugin override so the patched source plugin was exercised.

Exact steps or command run after this patch: `OPENCLAW_DISABLE_PERSISTED_PLUGIN_REGISTRY=1 OPENCLAW_BUNDLED_PLUGINS_DIR=extensions OPENCLAW_TEST_TRUST_BUNDLED_PLUGINS_DIR=1 pnpm openclaw message thread list --channel discord --guild-id 1474893848617423062 --channel-id 1474979711258988735 --include-archived --limit 2 --json`

Evidence after fix: Copied live output from the local Discord `projects` archived-thread command:

```json
{
  "ok": true,
  "items": [],
  "complete": true,
  "hasMore": false,
  "returnedCount": 0,
  "source": "discord.threadList.archived",
  "query": {
    "guildId": "1474893848617423062",
    "channelId": "1474979711258988735",
    "includeArchived": true,
    "limit": 2
  },
  "threads": {
    "threads": [],
    "members": [],
    "has_more": false
  },
  "members": []
}
```

Observed result after fix: The active guild thread-list and archived `projects` thread-list both completed successfully through the Discord plugin and produced the normalized contract shape. A read-only sweep of local text channels found no archived threads, so the live result proves the compatible empty-page path without creating or uploading any Discord content.

What was not tested: A live non-empty archived-thread page with `has_more: true`, because the local Discord server had no archived threads in the swept text channels and I did not create or post test data. The paged cursor path is covered by focused regression coverage in this PR.
target.author: fuller-stack-dev
